title: Implement soil improvements for garden and turf areas
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement soil improvements for garden and turf areas demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
